**Important notices**

General how-to questions are often answered in the documentation at
https://muros.org/docs , please have a look there first.

Before you ask a new question, we ask you kindly to acknowledge the following:

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have checked the documentation at https://muros.org/docs
- [ ] I am convinced that my question is new after checking both open and closed issues
